narrative:
Sugar Creek Township has 3,817 registered voters, with 50.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.2 percentage points.
